text:
Once upon a time there was a charming little owl named Etherea. She loved reading mysteries, especially those centered around old houses with secretive histories.

Every autumn, Etherea would visit Oak Hall, a mansion that was said to have been home to a celebrated detective long ago. It sat high in a tranquil woodland just thick with autumn leaves.

One day, while exploring an old library upstairs, Etherea stumbled across a dusty detective novel about a missing heirloom necklace. Intrigued, she decided to investigate.

The necklace disappeared every year on Halloween. The last time it vanished was just last October.

Etherea spent weeks tracking down clues. She discovered an antique mirror hidden behind a waterfall. Whenever she looked into it, her reflection vanished.

She learned that a mysterious figure known only as "The Masked Muse" took it. Every Halloween moonlit night, he'd steal the reflection.
